sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81111" key="periau/gasma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιαύγ-ασμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n81111.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">encircling gleam</tr_>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
